Apache Juneau
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree

  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestResponse

Packages that use RestResponse
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API

  • Uses of RestResponse in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources with parameters of type RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Ok
    DebugResource.createJettyDump(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [POST /jetty/dump] - Generates and saves the jetty thread dump file to jetty-thread-dump.log.
    Reader
    DebugResource.getJettyDump(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /jetty/dump] - Generates and retrieves the jetty thread dump.

  • Uses of RestResponse in org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources with parameters of type RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.FileContents
    DirectoryResource.downloadFile(RestResponse res, String path)
    Downloads the contents of a file.
    org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.LogsResource.FileContents
    LogsResource.downloadFile(RestResponse res, String path)
    Downloads the contents of a file.
    org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.FileContents
    DirectoryResource.viewFile(RestResponse res, String path)
    Views the contents of a file.
    void
    LogsResource.viewFile(RestResponse res, String path, boolean highlight, String start, String end, String thread, String[] loggers, String[] severity)
    Views the contents of a log file with optional filtering.

  • Uses of RestResponse in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.addHeader(HttpHeader header)
    Adds a response header.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.cacheControl(String value)
    Sets the Cache-Control response header to the supplied directive string.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.cacheControl(CacheControl.Builder value)
    Sets the Cache-Control response header from a CacheControl.Builder.
    RestResponse
    RestOpContext.createResponse(RestSession session, RestRequest req)
    Creates a RestResponse object based on the specified incoming HttpServletResponse object and the request returned by RestOpContext.createRequest(RestSession).
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.downloadAs(String filename)
    Sets Content-Disposition to attachment so browsers typically download the body, using the given suggested file name (quoted filename parameter).
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.eTag(String value)
    Sets the ETag response header to the supplied wire value.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.eTag(EntityTag value)
    Sets the ETag response header to the canonical wire form of the supplied EntityTag.
    RestResponse
    RestOpSession.getResponse()
    Returns the REST response object for this session.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.lastModified(Instant value)
    Sets the Last-Modified response header to the supplied instant formatted as an RFC 7231 IMF-fixdate.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.lastModified(ZonedDateTime value)
    Sets the Last-Modified response header to the supplied date-time formatted as an RFC 7231 IMF-fixdate.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.sendPlainText(String text)
    Sets the output to a plain-text message regardless of the content type.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setAttribute(String name, Object value)
    Shortcut for calling getRequest().setAttribute(String,Object).
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setContent(Object output)
    Sets the HTTP output on the response.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setContentSchema(HttpPartSchema schema)
    Specifies the schema for the response content.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setDebug()
    Shortcut for calling setDebug(true).
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setDebug(Boolean b)
    Sets the "Debug" attribute to the specified boolean.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setException(Throwable t)
    Sets the "Exception" attribute to the specified throwable.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setHeader(String name, Object value)
    Sets a header on the request.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setHeader(HttpHeader header)
    Sets a response header.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setHeader(HttpPartSchema schema, String name, Object value)
    Sets a header on the request.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setMaxHeaderLength(int value)
    Specifies the maximum length for header values.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setNoTrace()
    Shortcut for calling setNoTrace(true).
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setNoTrace(Boolean b)
    Sets the "NoTrace" attribute to the specified boolean.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setResponseBeanMeta(ResponseBeanMeta rbm)
    Sets metadata about this response.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setSafeHeaders()
    Enabled safe-header mode.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setSerializer(Serializer value)
    Forces the Serializer used to serialize the response body set via setContent(Object) (or an equivalent return from the REST method), instead of choosing one from the Accept header.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<BasicHttpException>
    RestRequest.checkPreconditions(RestResponse response)
    Evaluates the conditional-request headers on this request against the response's currently-set ETag and Last-Modified values.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention with parameters of type RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    VersionMixin.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /version] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    VersionResource.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    VersionServlet.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    SeoMixin.getRobotsTxt(RestResponse res)
    [GET /robots.txt] — emit the configured robots policy as text/plain.
    void
    WellKnownMixin.getSecurityTxt(RestResponse res)
    [GET /.well-known/security.txt] — emit the configured RFC 9116 body, or 404 when unset.
    void
    SeoMixin.getSitemap(RestResponse res)
    [GET /sitemap.xml] — emit the configured sitemap as application/xml.
    void
    VersionProvider.serve(RestResponse res)
    Serves the assembled metadata as a JSON map.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs with parameters of type RestResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiJson(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.json] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as JSON, ignoring the Accept header.
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiYaml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.yaml] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as YAML, ignoring the Accept header.

    Method

    RateLimitGuard.guard(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)

    [POST /cache/flush] — run all registered cache-flush hooks (or a subset).

    Runs all registered cache-flush hooks (or a subset).
    void

    void

    void

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RawTemplateDispatcher.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Renders the raw template identified by the trailing request path onto the response.
    void
    ViewResource.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this child's subtree mount.
    void
    ViewServlet.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this servlet's sibling top-level mount.

    Method

    Returns an Apache Juneau image tag hyperlinked to "http://juneau.apache.org"

    Resolves the HTML content for this widget.

    ContentTypeMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    abstract String

    The label for the menu item as it's rendered in the menu bar.

    QueryMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    String
    ThemeMenuItem.getLabel(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    String
    MenuItemWidget.getScript(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns the Javascript needed for the show and hide actions of the menu item.
    String
    Widget.getScript(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Resolves any Javascript that should be added to the <head>/<script> element.
    String
    MenuItemWidget.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Defines a "menu-item" class that needs to be used on the outer element of the HTML returned by the MenuItemWidget.getHtml(RestRequest,RestResponse) method.
    String
    QueryMenuItem.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Returns CSS for the tooltips.
    String
    Widget.getStyle(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Resolves any CSS styles that should be added to the <head>/<style> element.
    protected String
    Widget.loadHtmlWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadHtml(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
    protected String
    Widget.loadScriptWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadScript(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
    protected String
    Widget.loadStyleWithVars(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, String name)
    Same as Widget.loadStyle(RestRequest,String) but replaces request-time SVL variables.
